others_conditional_modifiers_json.description: R5 Desert Pavilion: every 10s the wielder gains 48% of their own EM as bonus ATK for 12s; nearby party members gain 30% of that buff (=14.4% of the wielder's EM) as flat ATK for the same duration. Modeled as a flat assumption at a couple of representative wielder EM values; pick the state matching the wielder's actual EM (or adjust manually for anything else). Scoped as 'others' (not 'team') so it only applies when this weapon is on a support, not double-counted alongside the wielder's own self_modifiers_json atk_from_eleMas_ conversion when they're the scored main.
